subcodes.first_line: O steadfast leaf! The divine fragrance, from the repository of the light of oneness, hath turned unto thee, and the Ancient Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه مستقره نفحه ربانیه از مکمن ظهور نور احدیه بتو توجه نموده و هیکل قدم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
